__type.name: Repository
__type.description: A repository contains the content for a project.

fields.name: allowUpdateBranch
fields.description: Whether or not a pull request head branch that is behind its base branch can always be updated even if it is not required to be up to date before merging.

fields.name: archivedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the repository was archived.

fields.name: assignableUsers
fields.description: A list of users that can be assigned to issues in this repository.

fields.name: autoMergeAllowed
fields.description: Whether or not Auto-merge can be enabled on pull requests in this repository.

fields.name: branchProtectionRules
fields.description: A list of branch protection rules for this repository.

fields.name: codeOfConduct
fields.description: Returns the code of conduct for this repository

fields.name: codeowners
fields.description: Information extracted from the repository's `CODEOWNERS` file.

fields.name: collaborators
fields.description: A list of collaborators associated with the repository.

fields.name: commitComments
fields.description: A list of commit comments associated with the repository.

fields.name: contactLinks
fields.description: Returns a list of contact links associated to the repository

fields.name: contributingGuidelines
fields.description: Returns the contributing guidelines for this repository.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: defaultBranchRef
fields.description: The Ref associated with the repository's default branch.

fields.name: deleteBranchOnMerge
fields.description: Whether or not branches are automatically deleted when merged in this repository.

fields.name: dependencyGraphManifests
fields.description: A list of dependency manifests contained in the repository

fields.name: deployKeys
fields.description: A list of deploy keys that are on this repository.

fields.name: deployments
fields.description: Deployments associated with the repository

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the repository.

fields.name: descriptionHTML
fields.description: The description of the repository rendered to HTML.

fields.name: discussion
fields.description: Returns a single discussion from the current repository by number.

fields.name: discussionCategories
fields.description: A list of discussion categories that are available in the repository.

fields.name: discussionCategory
fields.description: A discussion category by slug.

fields.name: discussions
fields.description: A list of discussions that have been opened in the repository.

fields.name: diskUsage
fields.description: The number of kilobytes this repository occupies on disk.

fields.name: environment
fields.description: Returns a single active environment from the current repository by name.

fields.name: environments
fields.description: A list of environments that are in this repository.

fields.name: forkCount
fields.description: Returns how many forks there are of this repository in the whole network.

fields.name: forkingAllowed
fields.description: Whether this repository allows forks.

fields.name: forks
fields.description: A list of direct forked repositories.

fields.name: fundingLinks
fields.description: The funding links for this repository

fields.name: hasDiscussionsEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the repository has the Discussions feature enabled.

fields.name: hasIssuesEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the repository has issues feature enabled.

fields.name: hasProjectsEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the repository has the Projects feature enabled.

fields.name: hasPullRequestsEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the repository has the pull requests feature enabled.

fields.name: hasSponsorshipsEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the repository displays a Sponsor button for financial contributions.

fields.name: hasVulnerabilityAlertsEnabled
fields.description: Whether vulnerability alerts are enabled for the repository.

fields.name: hasWikiEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if the repository has wiki feature enabled.

fields.name: homepageUrl
fields.description: The repository's URL.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Repository object

fields.name: interactionAbility
fields.description: The interaction ability settings for this repository.

fields.name: isArchived
fields.description: Indicates if the repository is unmaintained.

fields.name: isBlankIssuesEnabled
fields.description: Returns true if the viewer can create a blank issue in this repository

fields.name: isDisabled
fields.description: Returns whether or not this repository disabled.

fields.name: isEmpty
fields.description: Returns whether or not this repository is empty.

fields.name: isFork
fields.description: Identifies if the repository is a fork.

fields.name: isInOrganization
fields.description: Indicates if a repository is either owned by an organization, or is a private fork of an organization repository.

fields.name: isLocked
fields.description: Indicates if the repository has been locked or not.

fields.name: isMirror
fields.description: Identifies if the repository is a mirror.

fields.name: isPrivate
fields.description: Identifies if the repository is private or internal.

fields.name: isSecurityPolicyEnabled
fields.description: Returns true if this repository has a security policy

fields.name: isTemplate
fields.description: Identifies if the repository is a template that can be used to generate new repositories.

fields.name: isUserConfigurationRepository
fields.description: Is this repository a user configuration repository?

fields.name: issue
fields.description: Returns a single issue from the current repository by number.

fields.name: issueOrPullRequest
fields.description: Returns a single issue-like object from the current repository by number.

fields.name: issueTemplates
fields.description: Returns a list of issue templates associated to the repository

fields.name: issueType
fields.description: Returns a single issue type by name

fields.name: issueTypes
fields.description: A list of the repository's issue types

fields.name: issues
fields.description: A list of issues that have been opened in the repository.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Returns a single label by name

fields.name: labels
fields.description: A list of labels associated with the repository.

fields.name: languages
fields.description: A list containing a breakdown of the language composition of the repository.

fields.name: latestRelease
fields.description: Get the latest release for the repository if one exists.

fields.name: licenseInfo
fields.description: The license associated with the repository

fields.name: lockReason
fields.description: The reason the repository has been locked.

fields.name: mentionableUsers
fields.description: A list of Users that can be mentioned in the context of the repository.

fields.name: mergeCommitAllowed
fields.description: Whether or not PRs are merged with a merge commit on this repository.

fields.name: mergeCommitMessage
fields.description: How the default commit message will be generated when merging a pull request.

fields.name: mergeCommitTitle
fields.description: How the default commit title will be generated when merging a pull request.

fields.name: mergeQueue
fields.description: The merge queue for a specified branch, otherwise the default branch if not provided.

fields.name: milestone
fields.description: Returns a single milestone from the current repository by number.

fields.name: milestones
fields.description: A list of milestones associated with the repository.

fields.name: mirrorUrl
fields.description: The repository's original mirror URL.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the repository.

fields.name: nameWithOwner
fields.description: The repository's name with owner.

fields.name: object
fields.description: A Git object in the repository

fields.name: openGraphImageUrl
fields.description: The image used to represent this repository in Open Graph data.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: The User owner of the repository.

fields.name: packages
fields.description: A list of packages under the owner.

fields.name: parent
fields.description: The repository parent, if this is a fork.

fields.name: pinnedDiscussions
fields.description: A list of discussions that have been pinned in this repository.

fields.name: pinnedEnvironments
fields.description: A list of pinned environments for this repository.

fields.name: pinnedIssues
fields.description: A list of pinned issues for this repository.

fields.name: planFeatures
fields.description: Returns information about the availability of certain features and limits based on the repository's billing plan.

fields.name: primaryLanguage
fields.description: The primary language of the repository's code.

fields.name: projectV2
fields.description: Finds and returns the Project according to the provided Project number.

fields.name: projectsResourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path listing the repository's projects

fields.name: projectsUrl
fields.description: The HTTP URL listing the repository's projects

fields.name: projectsV2
fields.description: List of projects linked to this repository.

fields.name: pullRequest
fields.description: Returns a single pull request from the current repository by number.

fields.name: pullRequestCreationPolicy
fields.description: The policy controlling who can create pull requests in this repository.

fields.name: pullRequestTemplates
fields.description: Returns a list of pull request templates associated to the repository

fields.name: pullRequests
fields.description: A list of pull requests that have been opened in the repository.

fields.name: pushedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the repository was last pushed to.

fields.name: rebaseMergeAllowed
fields.description: Whether or not rebase-merging is enabled on this repository.

fields.name: recentProjects
fields.description: Recent projects that this user has modified in the context of the owner.

fields.name: ref
fields.description: Fetch a given ref from the repository

fields.name: refs
fields.description: Fetch a list of refs from the repository

fields.name: release
fields.description: Lookup a single release given various criteria.

fields.name: releases
fields.description: List of releases which are dependent on this repository.

fields.name: repositoryCustomPropertyValue
fields.description: A custom property value for the repository.

fields.name: repositoryCustomPropertyValues
fields.description: A list of custom properties and their associated values for a repository.

fields.name: repositoryTopics
fields.description: A list of applied repository-topic associations for this repository.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this repository

fields.name: ruleset
fields.description: Returns a single ruleset from the current repository by ID.

fields.name: rulesets
fields.description: A list of rulesets for this repository.

fields.name: securityPolicyUrl
fields.description: The security policy URL.

fields.name: shortDescriptionHTML
fields.description: A description of the repository, rendered to HTML without any links in it.

fields.name: squashMergeAllowed
fields.description: Whether or not squash-merging is enabled on this repository.

fields.name: squashMergeCommitMessage
fields.description: How the default commit message will be generated when squash merging a pull request.

fields.name: squashMergeCommitTitle
fields.description: How the default commit title will be generated when squash merging a pull request.

fields.name: sshUrl
fields.description: The SSH URL to clone this repository

fields.name: stargazerCount
fields.description: Returns a count of how many stargazers there are on this object

fields.name: stargazers
fields.description: A list of users who have starred this starrable.

fields.name: submodules
fields.description: Returns a list of all submodules in this repository parsed from the .gitmodules file as of the default branch's HEAD commit.

fields.name: suggestedActors
fields.description: A list of suggested actors that can be attributed to content in this repository.

fields.name: tempCloneToken
fields.description: Temporary authentication token for cloning this repository.

fields.name: templateRepository
fields.description: The repository from which this repository was generated, if any.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this repository

fields.name: usesCustomOpenGraphImage
fields.description: Whether this repository has a custom image to use with Open Graph as opposed to being represented by the owner's avatar.

fields.name: viewerCanAdminister
fields.description: Indicates whether the viewer has admin permissions on this repository.

fields.name: viewerCanSeeIssueFields
fields.description: Indicates whether the current user can see issue fields in this repository

fields.name: viewerCanSubscribe
fields.description: Check if the viewer is able to change their subscription status for the repository.

fields.name: viewerCanUpdateTopics
fields.description: Indicates whether the viewer can update the topics of this repository.

fields.name: viewerDefaultCommitEmail
fields.description: The last commit email for the viewer.

fields.name: viewerDefaultMergeMethod
fields.description: The last used merge method by the viewer or the default for the repository.

fields.name: viewerHasStarred
fields.description: Returns a boolean indicating whether the viewing user has starred this starrable.

fields.name: viewerPermission
fields.description: The users permission level on the repository. Will return null if authenticated as an GitHub App.

fields.name: viewerPossibleCommitEmails
fields.description: A list of emails this viewer can commit with.

fields.name: viewerSubscription
fields.description: Identifies if the viewer is watching, not watching, or ignoring the subscribable entity.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Indicates the repository's visibility level.

fields.name: vulnerabilityAlert
fields.description: Returns a single vulnerability alert from the current repository by number.

fields.name: vulnerabilityAlerts
fields.description: A list of vulnerability alerts that are on this repository.

fields.name: watchers
fields.description: A list of users watching the repository.

fields.name: webCommitSignoffRequired
fields.description: Whether contributors are required to sign off on web-based commits in this repository.
